description: These slip-on toe ring sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the ankle straps and bright colour. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and jeans.UpperLeather toe ring to keep the big toe in place on the forefoot Ankle strap with buckle closure for added comfortSoft leather lining for added comfortSynthetic footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
